issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. The effect requires: (1) looking at 4 cards from top of deck, (2) filtering for {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type cards excluding [Camie], (3) revealing up to 1 card to add to hand, (4) placing remaining 3 cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only performs a basic search with no filter specification.
Filter is set to 'kind: Any' but should specify type requirement: {Fish-Man} OR {Merfolk}, with exclusion of card name [Camie]
Missing action to handle placement of non-selected cards at bottom of deck. The effect requires both a hand addition AND a deck reorder step.
